titles.title: You've Got My Word On It

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: I'll be there when you have fallen, And you have no strength to stand; When trials overtake you, And you need a helping hand. Oh when sickness has you bound, And you feel your pain's too great; Just lean on Me I'll comfort you, You can be sure I'm not too late.

verse.name: v2
v3
v4
verse.lines: You're standing on the Word that never fails, I'll lead you through the stormy gales; You've got My Word on it, My Word Divine.
